name: orbit
description: Orbit — AI Agent task scheduling platform (control plane + distributed Claude Code runners)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @orbit/shared && npm run build -w @orbit/apiserver && npm run build -w @orbit/web
scripts.dev:apiserver: npm run build -w @orbit/shared && npm run start:dev -w @orbit/apiserver
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @orbit/shared && npm run dev -w @orbit/web
